Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It looks like Sanada isn't here yet...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Sorry I'm late. I ran into some unexpected trouble.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}All right, here goes. Back me up, would you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}I'm gonna make pancakes. Think you can help?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}I guess you could say I've got a craving... I used to eat them all the time at the orphanage.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}I know they sell frozen ones nowadays, but nothing beats freshly cooked, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}I don't really need a reason, do I? I just felt like it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}You think so? I just thought more would be better than less.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Well, let's go on and get started. Okay, first things first...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}...Uh, what exactly do we do first?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}I think the recipe said to use lots of butter and to regulate the pan's temperature with a damp washcloth.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}...Wait, we put a washcloth in the pan? Won't it burn?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}You sure? Thanks. I don't know how to cook anything besides the stuff I use for bodybuilding.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}I can break the eggs and mix the batter. I'll leave the actual cooking part to you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Oh, so that's how you use the washcloth.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}How about we add some protein powder...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}Hey, don't look at me like that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}Oh, I better go get the plates.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}All right, I think this'll be enough.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}Wow, look at all the pancakes! I knew something smelled good.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}Yeah, just give me a minute. We can eat once I bring them out.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}Would you mind getting everyone else? And don't forget Amada.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}Whoa... It's like a Tartarus of pancakes![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}Did the two of you make all of these yourselves?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}Yeah, although {f 4 1} was the one who cooked 'em. I said I had a hankering, but we might've made too much.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}I like pancakes, but no way I can eat all of these myself. If you guys could pitch in, that'd be great.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}...So you like pancakes too, Sanada-san.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}Thank you! I can't wait to have some![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}I'll make some tea. I've got some leaves that'd be great for the occasion.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}It's pancake party time! ...As they say.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}...These are so good! I could eat them all day.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}Oh yeah? Good to hear.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_033_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}The flavor brings a smile to my face![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_034_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}Would ya say it... takes the cake?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_035_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}What are you, the chairman?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}These really are good though![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_036_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 42 0 0}They've been cooked to absolute perfection. My compliments to the chef.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_037_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 43 0 0}What is the difference between pancakes and hotcakes?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_039_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 45 0 0}Thanks for the pancakes. They were really good.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 46 0 0}Tasted like a lot of care went into them.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 47 0 0}If you ever make some again, I'd like to help out, too![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_040_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 48 0 0}For as many as we made, they sure did disappear fast.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_041_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 49 0 0}Cooking's not really one of my strong points.[n]{f 1 1}

{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 50 0 0}A certain someone would always say, "If you pour protein powder on the ingredients, then you shouldn't be in the kitchen, dumbass."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 51 0 0}Most of the time I only ever got to watch someone else cook, so I never really learned myself.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 52 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Anyways, thanks for helping out today. I'm hoping that cheered everyone up a little.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SEL_042_0_0
Dialog.Option: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}What made you want to do this?

Dialog.name: MSG_044_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 54 0 0}They did things like this back when I was at the orphanage. I just wanted to re-create it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 55 0 0}My sister used to cry all the time there, but the pancakes always brought a smile to her face.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_045_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 57 0 0}...Do you remember that medal you found in the package from my parents?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 58 0 0}My sister, Miki... She made that back when we were at the orphanage.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_046_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 59 0 0}Based on the letter that came with it, I guess my parents found it when they were cleaning.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 60 0 0}Miki was gonna give that to me after we learned I was getting adopted out and leaving.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 61 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}...But then that fire happened right after, and this medal was all that was left of her.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_048_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 62 0 0}...Apparently, Miki used to always say she wanted to thank me for being so strong and kind.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 63 0 0}She was really quiet, and she'd always be following me around.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 64 0 0}I don't really remember doing anything special for her, but I guess she was relying on me as her older brother.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_049_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 65 0 0}Seeing that medal made me think.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 66 0 0}Would my sister be proud of who I am now?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 67 0 0}Am I really strong and kind enough to deserve that medal?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_050_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 68 0 0}If I'm being honest, I don't really know what it means to be strong or kind.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 69 0 0}Everyone who's ever said that to me has left without telling me the most important part.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 70 0 0}You saw how I was today... This is all I'm capable of right now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 71 0 0}I haven't grown at all since I was a kid. They'd laugh if they saw me now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_052_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 72 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}...Maybe my sister would say that, but you know not everyone would cut me that much slack.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_053_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 73 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Heh. I'm glad you feel that way, but I've still got a long way to go.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_054_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 74 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}That's true. Sweet foods can relieve fatigue. I think I'll be ready to fight again by tomorrow.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_055_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 75 0 0}I realized I'd just been running away all this time, making excuses about having my own problems.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 76 0 0}But from now on, I'm gonna protect it all.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 77 0 0}We promised we'd become strong together... I won't let him down.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_057_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 78 0 0}Well, if that's how you feel, then I better not disappoint.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_058_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 79 0 0}Thanks, I really appreciate that. I'll be counting on you next time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_059_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 80 0 0}Yeah. I've got people like you looking up to me, so I can't let them down.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_060_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 81 0 0}Heh, the point of this whole thing was to cheer everyone up, and yet I'm the one getting supported here.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 82 0 0}You know, I think you're the kind of person my sister would've looked up to.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_061_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 83 0 0}All right, that's enough talking about the past. Let's hurry up and finish clean—[cr][n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_063_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 85 0 0}Well, I ran into that group of punks on my way home from shopping today.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 86 0 0}There were even more of 'em this time, and one guy managed to get a good hit in.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_064_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 87 0 0}Don't worry though. I didn't do anything that would get me in trouble with the police.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 88 0 0}I just let them throw as many punches as they wanted until they got tired and gave up.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 89 0 0}I thought I could dodge them all, but, uh... I guess I've still got room to improve.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_065_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I finished cleaning up with Sanada,[n]then went back to my room...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like my {f 4 30 1 1 1 0} has improved[n]after seeing how caring Sanada is...[n]{f 1 1}
